free_text: Thin Li-6 glass scintillator (0.5 mm thick) as
ORNL/RPI Monte Carlo code for area analysis
Correction was applied to the data to account for
neutron sensitivity of the capture detector and was
based on the value of neutron-width used in the
analysis plus experimental estimate of the efficiency
Multiple scattering and self-shielding were corrected
No information on the source of uncertainty
